texto: A state that suppresses all freedom of speech, and which by imposing the most terrible punishments, treats each and every attempt at criticism, however morally justified, and every suggestion for improvement as plotting to high treason, is a state that breaks an unwritten law.
explicacao: Citação de Kurt Huber sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. “A state that suppresses all freedom of speech, and which by imposing the most terrible punishment…” articula desenvolvimento-pessoal, law, improvement em registro de desenvolvimento pessoal, com relevância para contextos como improvement.
